articles.title: US Stock Market: An 800-year-old math principle to spot bottom of S&P 500's rout
articles.description: The S&P 500 Index faces its worst month in a year. Technical analysis points to a potential 9% drop before finding support. This level, known as the 50% Fibonacci retracement, is a key indicator for traders. Geopolitical events and oil prices add to market uncertainty. Investors watch for resolutions to global conflicts and inflation pressures.

articles.title: Global Market: Saudi Wealth Fund to maintain global bets
articles.description: Saudi Arabia's wealth fund, the Public Investment Fund, is committed to global investments.  Governor Yasir Al Rumayyan stated the fund's strong financial position.  Despite regional conflicts, Gulf investors are proceeding with international deals.  The PIF plans to increase its annual deployment and boost domestic and international private sector involvement.  Saudi Arabia aims to attract global investment.

articles.title: State debt deluge keeps bond yields under pressure
articles.description: Indian government bond yields are expected to face pressure due to a record weekly supply of state debt, with auctions likely to exceed notified amounts. This significant issuance could lead to a crowding-out effect, pushing the 10-year benchmark yield towards 6.90%-6.95%.

articles.title: MSMEs tap working capital amid rising input cost pressures

Sectors like hospitality, chemicals, and basmati rice exporters are expected to see increased drawdowns and fresh sanctions as they navigate rising costs.

articles.title: Haryana’s cotton farms holding on by a thread

As farmers ditch cotton for paddy, the impact is soon likely to be felt by farm labourers, traders, and the economy as a whole, reports Ashok Kumar

topStories.title: US Stock Market: An 800-year-old math principle to spot bottom of S&P 500's rout
topStories.description: The S&P 500 Index faces its worst month in a year. Technical analysis points to a potential 9% drop before finding support. This level, known as the 50% Fibonacci retracement, is a key indicator for traders. Geopolitical events and oil prices add to market uncertainty. Investors watch for resolutions to global conflicts and inflation pressures.

topStories.title: Trump’s signature to be added to US Dollars in first for a sitting president; Bessent hails ‘no more powerful way to…’
topStories.description: US Treasury to add President Trump’s signature to dollar bills, replacing the treasurer’s name in a historic first tied to the nation’s 250th anniversary.

topStories.title: Iran US War News LIVE: Trump pauses Iran energy strikes till April 6; Thai‑flagged cargo ship hit in Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Iran US War News LIVE: President Donald Trump has extended the pause on potential US strikes targeting Iran’s energy infrastructure, pushing the deadline back by 10 days to April 6, while maintaining that negotiations with Tehran are progressing ‘very well.’

topStories.title: Iran war live: Trump delays attacks on Iranian energy sector by 10 days
topStories.description: Iranian missiles, drones target Kuwait, UAE, Saudi Arabia and Jordan as Trump says Iran has 'chance to make a deal'.

topStories.title: MSMEs tap working capital amid rising input cost pressures
topStories.description: MSMEs and other industries are experiencing higher working capital utilization as input costs escalate due to the US-Israel conflict. This trend, driven by slower cash flows and margin pressures, is prompting lenders to ensure adequate liquidity support. Sectors like hospitality, chemicals, and basmati rice exporters are expected to see increased drawdowns and fresh sanctions as they navigate rising costs.

topStories.title: Trump's Signature To Appear Paper Currency In 1st For Sitting President
topStories.description: The US Treasury Department plans to put President Donald Trump's signature on all new US paper currency, the agency announced on Thursday.

topStories.title: Long airport queues to end soon? Trump moves to pay TSA officers ‘immediately’ amid DHS shutdown
topStories.description: Trump plans emergency order to pay TSA officers amid DHS shutdown as airport delays worsen across US and staff shortages hit security lines.

topStories.title: US Deploys Uncrewed Drone Boats In Conflict With Iran
topStories.description: The United States has deployed uncrewed drone speedboats for patrols as part of its operations against Iran, the Pentagon said.

topStories.title: Costa Rica to accept 25 deportees per week under Trump deportation effort
topStories.description: The Central American nation is latest to sign a 'third-country' deportation agreement with the Trump administration.

topStories.title: Trump ‘pausing’ plan to destroy Iranian power plants for 10 days
topStories.description: Donald Trump says he is “pausing” his plan to destroy Iranian power plants for 10 days.

topStories.title: EU’s top diplomat urges US to pressure Russia to stop aiding Iran
topStories.description: The European Union’s Foreign Policy Chief Kaja Kallas says the US needs to pressure Russia to stop assisting Iran.

topStories.title: "It's An Option": Trump On Taking Control Of Iran's Oil Amid Tensions
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump said that taking control of Iran's oil supply remains "an option", although he did not elaborate when asked about the possibility amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle...

dailyNews.description: Despite claims from Donald Trump that negotiations are underway, Tehran has publicly rejected any diplomatic approach from Washington.

dailyNews.title: '10 Oil Tankers Through Hormuz': Trump Reveals Iran's 'Present' To US
dailyNews.description: Trump made the comments at a Cabinet meeting in the White House, elaborating on what he had previously described as a "present" from Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump speaks out on Iran's execution of 19-year-old wrestler Saleh Mohammadi
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump addressed Iran's reported execution of 19-year-old wrestler Saleh Mohammadi, saying he was killed for speaking against the regime.

dailyNews.title: Schumer, Dems block DHS funding again as Trump intervenes to pay TSA agents
dailyNews.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune, R-S.D., said bipartisan DHS shutdown talks are progressing after Republicans sent Democrats what he called a "last and final" funding offer.

dailyNews.title: President Trump insists MAGA 'loves' his war on Iran: 'MAGA people are smart'
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said the MAGA base supports his military campaign on Iran during an interview on "The Five," noting that supporters know he's protecting the United States.

dailyNews.title: Trump declares national emergency at airports, will sign order instructing DHS to 'immediately pay' TSA agents
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced a forthcoming executive order to have DHS pay TSA agents during the shutdown, citing airport chaos and blaming Democrats in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Treasury to place Trump’s signature on paper currency to mark nation's 250th anniversary
dailyNews.description: Trump's signature will appear on U.S. dollar bills, the Treasury Department said, marking the first time in 165 years a president's name will appear on currency.

dailyNews.title: Fox News Poll: Sour voters say Washington is out of touch
dailyNews.description: A new national poll finds Trump's disapproval hits a second-term high of 59%, and his inflation approval dropped to 28% as voter pessimism grows.
